dashboard.title: Welcome to MindEase
dashboard.subtitle: Your cognitive support companion
dashboard.body: MindEase is designed to help you manage tasks, maintain focus, and optimize your cognitive performance. Use the sidebar to navigate between different features and customize your experience.
dashboard.quickActionsBody: Start your day by reviewing your task list, setting up a focus session, or adjusting your cognitive settings to match your current needs.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.body: Mock tasks list goes here. You will be able to create, prioritize, and track your tasks with cognitive-friendly layouts.

focus.title: Focus Mode
focus.body: Mock focus session setup. You will configure timers, ambient sounds, and focus settings tailored to your needs.

cognitive.title: Cognitive Settings
cognitive.body: Mock settings panel. You will adjust cognitive intensity, notifications, and accessibility preferences here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Mock settings screen. You will manage account preferences, notifications, and integrations here.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to MindEase
login.helper: Your session will be saved on this device.
login.switchToRegister: Don't have an account? Sign up

errors.missingFields: Please enter your email and password.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join MindEase to get started
register.helper: Your account will be created and you'll be logged in automatically.
register.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

errors.passwordFieldsRequired: Please fill in all password fields.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.updateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
errors.changeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.

quickTheme.description: Quickly adjust the visual theme. This selection is shared with the cognitive panel and stays available across the app.

cognitiveSettings.description: Personalize reading, focus, sensory load, and preset cognitive profiles. Changes are saved automatically and shared with other screens.

status.error: We couldn't sync everything right now: {{message}}

reading.title: Reading
reading.description: Font, size, and spacing adjustments to reduce reading effort.

focus.title: Focus
focus.description: Reduce distractions and prioritize the active task.

sensory.title: Sensory
sensory.description: Control theme, sounds, and stronger interface indicators.

emotion.title: Emotion
emotion.description: Apply presets and review the current cognitive interface state.

letterSpacing.title: Increase letter spacing
letterSpacing.description: Adds more visual breathing room between characters.

hideSidebar.title: Hide sidebar
hideSidebar.description: Removes desktop side navigation to keep attention on the current task.

highlightActiveTask.title: Highlight active task
highlightActiveTask.description: Allows visually marking the current checklist item.

animationsEnabled.title: Keep animations
animationsEnabled.description: Disable to reduce transitions and motion.

simpleInterface.title: Simple interface
simpleInterface.description: Reduces shadow, metadata, and secondary visual elements.

muteSounds.title: Mute sounds
muteSounds.description: Turns off auditory alerts and sound-based reinforcement.

hideUrgencyIndicators.title: Hide urgency indicators
hideUrgencyIndicators.description: Hides priority badges and stronger visual cues.

reading.label: Reading
reading.description: More spacing, friendlier font, and larger text.

focus.label: Focus
focus.description: Lean interface, no animations, and active task emphasis.

sensory.label: Sensory
sensory.description: Soft colors, less urgency, and fewer intense stimuli.

emotion.label: Emotion
emotion.description: A calmer visual tone to reduce digital anxiety.
